name: Auré
styleSignature: Clean luxe beauty photography, soft cinematic daylight with gentle diffused window light and a faint golden glow, warm ivory and cream tones (#f7f1e8, #efe4d4) with champagne gold (#caa765), soft blush rose (#e7c4c0) and deep espresso-plum ink (#3a2a30) accents, dewy luminous skin, polished marble surfaces, water droplets, botanical serums and gold instruments, shallow depth of field, soft focus, airy negative space, calm spa-serene mood, photoreal premium beauty editorial. No text, no words, no letters.
